ICasperSigVerifier","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{"checkNote((string,string,string,string,string,address,string,string,uint32,uint32,string,uint64,bytes32),bytes,bytes32,bytes)":{"params":{"canonicalSigningBytes":"The State-changing: marks the      nonce consumed so the same note cannot open credit twice (one note = one draw)."},"structuralCommitment((string,string,string,string,string,address,string,string,uint32,uint32,string,uint64,bytes32))":{"details":"keccak over the abi-encoded note fields. The relayer computes the same      commitment off-chain from the parsed CAN; mismatch means the supplied      `canonicalSigningBytes` do not correspond to the supplied struct."}},"title":"Cred402CreditNoteVerifier","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"chainCaip2()":{"notice":"This satellite's CAIP-2 chain id (e.g. \"eip155:8453\"); CAN.targetChain must match."},"checkNote((string,string,string,string,string,address,string,string,uint32,uint32,string,uint64,bytes32),bytes,bytes32,bytes)":{"notice":"Pure view check of a CAN against this satellite, without consuming the nonce."},"consumeNote((string,string,string,string,string,address,string,string,uint32,uint32,string,uint64,bytes32),bytes,bytes32,bytes)":{"notice":"Verify a CAN for `msg.sender` (the target pool) and consume its nonce."},"consumedNonce(bytes32)":{"notice":"Consumed nonces \u2014 single-use note replay protection."},"policyPublicKey()":{"notice":"The Casper policy public key (32-byte ed25519 key bytes after the 01 prefix)."},"structuralCommitment((string,string,string,string,string,address,string,string,uint32,uint32,string,uint64,bytes32))":{"notice":"Structural commitment binding the CAN struct to its canonical bytes."},"verifier()":{"notice":"The ed25519 verification precompile/oracle for Casper policy signatures."}},"notice":"Verifies a Casper-policy ed25519 signature over a Credit Authorization Note         (CAN) and enforces expiry / target / single-use nonce replay protection. The CAN is the most important multichain credit object (p3 \u00a76): a short-lived, Casper-policy-signed permission letting a satellite open or modify a credit line for an agent up to a global-exposure-checked limit. EVM executes credit; Casper approves it. The struct below mirrors `crosschain/standards/credit_notes.ts` field-for-field. Canonical bytes: the off-chain relayer serializes the CAN *without* its `casper_policy_signature` field as canonical JSON (stable key order) \u2014 exactly `noteSigningPayload(can)` in the standard \u2014 and passes those bytes as `canonicalSigningBytes`. We verify the ed25519 signature over those bytes via the `ICasperSigVerifier` precompile/oracle, and additionally bind the bytes to the supplied struct fields by re-deriving and comparing a structural commitment, so a caller cannot present matching bytes for a different note.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/Cred402CreditNoteVerifier.sol":"Cred402CreditNoteVerifier"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/Cred402CreditNoteVerifier.sol":{"keccak256":"0xe3663c594cdaed71afc557173e7fed72c950525ee8ea9098304fc5e2a832bbc4","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://ebcc7ea390f03bb51a3672ec5cf385e9e7dd8c03c9613cbf2ad09c33cf83aeec","dweb:/ipfs/QmcXUE8HSeRpA7MHMcUJH49CAPEbCAd6PFu8oeXmNhGQFQ"]},"src/Cred402EmergencyPause.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8ed9393a363e071dcd8ff3c1cd7b8f1b21f6df45f7aae540393b39548f452e20","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8fdd50473f8e6536afe89eafeca5a7934d77c3758d87fbcb1e25eef45e9f80a1","dweb:/ipfs/Qmc59ERNs7jmJ3c6XGyUwgpUwCivPztLQfPDoN6zbkMpUL"]},"src/interfaces/ICasperSigVerifier.sol":{"keccak256":"0x2d7fc6bbab95cd786fb46cdc8e5e3522b58ef108aa688d88c7c6182467f8ee37","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://5e156c0b6f8cfbe17c6cf03bfd4dba9ce9588c15001e25950f345be172f1c787","dweb:/ipfs/QmZshSztDKMAeLt9zkW1StgZDUHed8C3hwBPBKVoz6voFK"]}},"version":1}

params.canonicalSigningBytes: The exact canonical JSON bytes the policy key signed        (CAN without `casper_policy_signature`), and which `commitment` commits to.
params.commitment: keccak commitment the relayer derived over the same canonical        bytes; must equal `structuralCommitment(note)` AND be bound to the bytes.

returns.ok: True if all structural, temporal, target, and signature checks pass.

consumeNote((string,string,string,string.details: Intended to be called by `Cred402CreditVault.draw`. State-changing: marks the      nonce consumed so the same note cannot open credit twice (one note = one draw).

structuralCommitment((string,string,stri.details: keccak over the abi-encoded note fields. The relayer computes the same      commitment off-chain from the parsed CAN; mismatch means the supplied      `canonicalSigningBytes` do not correspond to the supplied struct.

chainCaip2().notice: This satellite's CAIP-2 chain id (e.g. "eip155:8453"); CAN.targetChain must match.

checkNote((string,string,string,string,s.notice: Pure view check of a CAN against this satellite, without consuming the nonce.

consumeNote((string,string,string,string.notice: Verify a CAN for `msg.sender` (the target pool) and consume its nonce.

consumedNonce(bytes32).notice: Consumed nonces — single-use note replay protection.

policyPublicKey().notice: The Casper policy public key (32-byte ed25519 key bytes after the 01 prefix).

structuralCommitment((string,string,stri.notice: Structural commitment binding the CAN struct to its canonical bytes.

verifier().notice: The ed25519 verification precompile/oracle for Casper policy signatures.
